ConstructorArguments: A prop is defined by its model. The model can define its health and what happens when it breaks. This component is designed to be easy to use - since you only need to define the model. Although you can access the procedural (hidden) components, they aren't saved, so it's a waste of time.

Documentation.Summary:
A prop is defined by its model. The model can define its health and what happens when it breaks.
This component is designed to be easy to use - since you only need to define the model. Although you can 
access the procedural (hidden) components, they aren't saved, so it's a waste of time.
